##########################################################
# Generated preset override: The Great War Redux - WW1 economy with expanded content
# This file is generated by Tools/tbm_compat_tool.py
##########################################################

##########################################################
# Tech Baseline Mechanics — Evaluation Scripted Effects
# All effects run in COUNTRY scope.
# Assumes tbm_scoring.txt has already set:
#   tbm_global_power, tbm_land_competence, tbm_air_competence,
#   tbm_naval_competence, tbm_industry_competence
# Assumes global.tbm_current_year exists.
##########################################################

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Effect 1: tbm_assign_power_tier
#
# Maps tbm_global_power -> tbm_tier_index (0..5)
# with +5 hysteresis on promotion and -5 on demotion.
# Then sets tbm_base_lag and tbm_quarterly_cap.
#---------------------------------------------------------
tbm_assign_power_tier = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    # On first evaluation (new country, civil war winner, released nation),
    # assign the correct tier directly from current power — no hysteresis.
    # This prevents newly spawned countries from being stuck at Micro for
    # months while the +1-per-pass hysteresis slowly catches up.
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = tbm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 0 }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 300 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 150 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 4 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 90 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 3 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 45 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 2 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 20 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 1 }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { tbm_old_tier_index = tbm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # Tier movement
    # Evaluate from the tier at the start of the pass so a
    # broken refresh cannot jump multiple tiers at once.
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_old_tier_index value = 0 compare = equals } }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 20 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 1 }
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_old_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 41 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 2 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 10 compare = less_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 0 }
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_old_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 77 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 3 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 31 compare = less_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 1 }
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_old_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 130 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 4 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 67 compare = less_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 2 }
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_old_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 190 compare = greater_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 120 compare = less_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 3 }
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_old_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_global_power value = 180 compare = less_than } }
            set_variable = { tbm_tier_index = 4 }
        }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { tbm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { tbm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Grant cap by tier (per 6-month evaluation cycle)
    # Superpower=12, Great=10, Regional=8, MinorInd=6, Minor=4, Micro=2
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 12 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 10 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 8 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_grant_cap option = TBM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = tbm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_grant_cap option = TBM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # TBM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — TBM mode modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = tbm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { tbm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = tbm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_notifications option = TBM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = tbm_event.2 }
    }
}

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Effect 1b: tbm_compute_branch_caps
#
# Computes per-branch grant caps from tier (base) and
# branch competence (multiplier). Replaces the single
# shared cap with four independent caps so that weaker
# branches are not starved by stronger ones.
#
# Base per branch:  Tier 5-4 = 3,  Tier 3-2 = 2,  Tier 1-0 = 1
# Multiplier:  Cutting Edge (>84) = x1.5,  Advanced (>59) = x1.25,
#              Standard (>34) = x1.0,  Basic (>14) = x0.5,
#              Minimal (<=14) = x0 (blocked by category gates)
#---------------------------------------------------------
tbm_compute_branch_caps = {

    # --- Base cap from tier ---
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_branch_base_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_branch_base_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { tbm_branch_base_cap = 1 }
    }

    # --- Land cap ---
    # Competence multiplier applied to base: CE=x1.5, Adv=x1.25, Std=x1, Basic=x0.5, Min=0
    set_variable = { tbm_cap_land = 0 }
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 14 compare = greater_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_cap_land = tbm_branch_base_cap }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 84 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 59 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.25 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 34 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.0 }
        }
        else = {
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 0.5 }
        }
        multiply_variable = { tbm_cap_land = tbm_cap_mult }
    }

    # --- Air cap ---
    set_variable = { tbm_cap_air = 0 }
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 14 compare = greater_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_cap_air = tbm_branch_base_cap }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 84 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 59 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.25 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 34 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.0 }
        }
        else = {
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 0.5 }
        }
        multiply_variable = { tbm_cap_air = tbm_cap_mult }
    }

    # --- Naval cap ---
    set_variable = { tbm_cap_naval = 0 }
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 14 compare = greater_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_cap_naval = tbm_branch_base_cap }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 84 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 59 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.25 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 34 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.0 }
        }
        else = {
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 0.5 }
        }
        multiply_variable = { tbm_cap_naval = tbm_cap_mult }
    }

    # --- Industry cap ---
    set_variable = { tbm_cap_industry = 0 }
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 14 compare = greater_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_cap_industry = tbm_branch_base_cap }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 84 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 59 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.25 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 34 compare = greater_than } }
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 1.0 }
        }
        else = {
            set_temp_variable = { tbm_cap_mult = 0.5 }
        }
        multiply_variable = { tbm_cap_industry = tbm_cap_mult }
    }

    # --- Game rule modifiers ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_grant_cap option = TBM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        multiply_variable = { tbm_cap_land = 0.5 }
        multiply_variable = { tbm_cap_air = 0.5 }
        multiply_variable = { tbm_cap_naval = 0.5 }
        multiply_variable = { tbm_cap_industry = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_grant_cap option = TBM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_cap_land = 999 }
        set_variable = { tbm_cap_air = 999 }
        set_variable = { tbm_cap_naval = 999 }
        set_variable = { tbm_cap_industry = 999 }
    }

    # --- Total for dashboard display ---
    set_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_land }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_air }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_naval }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_quarterly_cap = tbm_cap_industry }
}

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Effect 2: tbm_assign_allowed_categories
#
# Clears all category flags, then conditionally sets them
# based on tier, branch competence, and tech scope rule.
#---------------------------------------------------------
tbm_assign_allowed_categories = {

    # ===================================================
    # Clear all category flags
    # ===================================================
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_air
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_modern_tanks
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_cas
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_cruisers
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
    clr_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets

    # ===================================================
    # CORE categories (always allowed under all tech scopes)
    # ===================================================

    # tbm_cat_infantry — Micro+ (tier >= 0), no branch minimum
    set_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry

    # tbm_cat_support — Minor+ (tier >= 1), land or industry >= 15
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            OR = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 14 compare = greater_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 14 compare = greater_than }
            }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
    }

    # tbm_cat_artillery, tbm_cat_anti_air, tbm_cat_anti_tank — Minor+ (tier >= 1), land >= 15
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 14 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_air
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
    }

    # tbm_cat_industry — Minor+ (tier >= 1), industry >= 15
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_industry_band value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 14 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
    }

    # ===================================================
    # NON-CORE categories — gated by tech scope Rule 3
    # TBM_CORE_ONLY blocks all of these.
    # TBM_CORE_AIR_NAVAL allows air + naval but blocks
    #   advanced land (motorised, mechs, tanks) and
    #   electronics/radar.
    # TBM_ALL_EXCEPT_DOCTRINES / TBM_EVERYTHING allow all.
    # ===================================================

    # --- Electronics & Radar (blocked by CORE_ONLY and CORE_AIR_NAVAL) ---

    # tbm_cat_electronics, tbm_cat_radar — Regional+ (tier >= 3), industry >= 35
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_AIR_NAVAL } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_industry_band value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 34 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
    }

    # --- Advanced Land (blocked by CORE_ONLY and CORE_AIR_NAVAL) ---

    # tbm_cat_motorised — Minor Industrial+ (tier >= 2), land >= 25
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_AIR_NAVAL } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_land_band value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 24 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
    }

    # tbm_cat_mechanised, tbm_cat_medium_tanks — Regional+ (tier >= 3), land >= 45
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_AIR_NAVAL } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_land_band value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 44 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
    }

    # tbm_cat_light_tanks, tbm_cat_tanks_generic — Regional+ (tier >= 3), land >= 35
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_AIR_NAVAL } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_land_band value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 34 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
    }

    # tbm_cat_heavy_tanks, tbm_cat_modern_tanks — Great Power+ (tier >= 4), land >= 70
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_AIR_NAVAL } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_land_band value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 69 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_modern_tanks
    }

    # --- Air categories (blocked by CORE_ONLY only) ---

    # tbm_cat_fighters, tbm_cat_cas — Minor Industrial+ (tier >= 2), air >= 25
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_air_band value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 24 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_cas
    }

    # tbm_cat_heavy_fighters, tbm_cat_tactical_bombers — Regional+ (tier >= 3), air >= 45
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_air_band value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 44 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
    }

    # tbm_cat_strategic_bombers — Great Power+ (tier >= 4), air >= 70
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_air_band value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 69 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
    }

    # tbm_cat_naval_bombers — Regional+ (tier >= 3), air >= 35
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            num_of_naval_factories > 0
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_air_band value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_naval_band value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 34 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
    }

    # tbm_cat_transport — Minor Industrial+ (tier >= 2), air >= 20
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_air_band value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 19 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
    }

    # --- Naval categories (blocked by CORE_ONLY only) ---

    # tbm_cat_submarines, tbm_cat_destroyers — Minor Industrial+ (tier >= 2), naval >= 25
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            num_of_naval_factories > 0
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_naval_band value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 24 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
    }

    # tbm_cat_light_cruisers, tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers — Regional+ (tier >= 3), naval >= 45
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            num_of_naval_factories > 0
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_naval_band value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 44 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_cruisers
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers
    }

    # tbm_cat_battleships, tbm_cat_carriers — Great Power+ (tier >= 4), naval >= 70
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            num_of_naval_factories > 7
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_naval_band value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 69 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
    }

    # tbm_cat_naval_support — Minor Industrial+ (tier >= 2), naval >= 20
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_CORE_ONLY } }
            num_of_naval_factories > 0
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_naval_band value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 19 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
    }

    # --- Superweapons (nuclear, rockets) ---
    # Require Superpower (tier 5), industry >= 85
    # Also require Rule 5 (TBM_TECH_SCOPE) is TBM_EVERYTHING

    # tbm_cat_nuclear, tbm_cat_rockets — Superpower, industry >= 85, Rule 5 allows
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_tech_scope option = TBM_EVERYTHING }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_struct_industry_band value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 84 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
        set_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
    }
}

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Effect 3a: tbm_prepare_country_context_cache
#
# Caches the expensive country-context checks that are reused
# across multiple branch lag calculations in the same refresh.
#---------------------------------------------------------
tbm_prepare_country_context_cache = {
    set_variable = { tbm_context_war_bonus = 0 }
    set_variable = { tbm_context_desperation_bonus = 0 }
    set_variable = { tbm_context_combat_bonus = 0 }
    set_variable = { tbm_context_defensive_bonus = 0 }
    set_variable = { tbm_context_faction_bonus = 0 }
    set_variable = { tbm_context_lend_lease_bonus = 0 }
    set_variable = { tbm_context_puppet_bonus = 0 }
    set_variable = { tbm_context_mode_multiplier = 1.0 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_context_mode_multiplier = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_ARCADE }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_context_mode_multiplier = 1.25 }
    }

    if = {
        limit = { has_war = yes }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_war_faction_catchup option = TBM_WF_ENHANCED }
            }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_war_bonus = 1.0 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_war_faction_catchup option = TBM_WF_STANDARD }
            }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_war_bonus = 0.5 }
        }
    }

    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_anti_death_spiral option = TBM_ADS_ENHANCED }
        }
        if = {
            limit = { surrender_progress > 0.2 }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_desperation_bonus = 0.75 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { surrender_progress > 0.1 }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_desperation_bonus = 0.5 }
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_anti_death_spiral option = TBM_ADS_STANDARD }
        }
        if = {
            limit = { surrender_progress > 0.4 }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_desperation_bonus = 0.75 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { surrender_progress > 0.2 }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_desperation_bonus = 0.5 }
        }
    }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_context_desperation_bonus value = tbm_context_war_bonus compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_context_combat_bonus = tbm_context_desperation_bonus }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { tbm_context_combat_bonus = tbm_context_war_bonus }
    }

    if = {
        limit = { tbm_is_defensive_war = yes }
        set_variable = { tbm_context_defensive_bonus = 0.25 }
    }

    if = {
        limit = { tbm_is_in_faction_with_major = yes }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_war_faction_catchup option = TBM_WF_ENHANCED }
            }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_faction_bonus = 1.0 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_war_faction_catchup option = TBM_WF_STANDARD }
            }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_faction_bonus = 0.5 }
        }

        # Inline lend-lease check (moved from on_monthly pre-pass to avoid
        # iterating all countries; now only runs for current-bucket countries).
        if = {
            limit = {
                is_in_faction = yes
                any_country = {
                    is_lend_leasing = PREV
                    check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
                }
            }
            set_variable = { tbm_context_lend_lease_bonus = 0.25 }
        }
    }

    if = {
        limit = {
            tbm_is_puppet_eligible = yes
            overlord = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_context_puppet_bonus = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            tbm_is_puppet_eligible = yes
            overlord = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_context_puppet_bonus = 0.5 }
    }

    multiply_variable = { tbm_context_combat_bonus = tbm_context_mode_multiplier }
    multiply_variable = { tbm_context_defensive_bonus = tbm_context_mode_multiplier }
    multiply_variable = { tbm_context_faction_bonus = tbm_context_mode_multiplier }
    multiply_variable = { tbm_context_lend_lease_bonus = tbm_context_mode_multiplier }
    multiply_variable = { tbm_context_puppet_bonus = tbm_context_mode_multiplier }
}

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Effect 3a: tbm_compute_minimum_effective_lag
#
# Mode-sensitive lag floor. Realistic/Historical stay furthest
# from the frontier; Arcade is loosest.
#---------------------------------------------------------
tbm_compute_minimum_effective_lag = {
    set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 0.0 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 1.0 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 1.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 2.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 3.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 4.5 }
        }
        else = {
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 6.0 }
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_BALANCED }
        }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 0.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 1.0 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 2.0 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 3.0 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 4.0 }
        }
        else = {
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 5.0 }
        }
    }
    else = {
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 0.0 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 0.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 1.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 2.5 }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 3.5 }
        }
        else = {
            set_variable = { tbm_minimum_effective_lag = 4.5 }
        }
    }
}

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Effect 3: tbm_compute_effective_lag
#
# Computes per-branch effective lag from tbm_base_lag,
# applying competence bonuses plus cached country-context bonuses.
#---------------------------------------------------------
tbm_compute_effective_lag = {
    tbm_prepare_country_context_cache = yes
    tbm_compute_minimum_effective_lag = yes

    # Shared competence thresholds (identical across all branches)
    set_variable = { tbm_comp_threshold_minus_40 = tbm_tier_avg }
    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_comp_threshold_minus_40 = 40 }
    set_variable = { tbm_comp_threshold_minus_20 = tbm_tier_avg }
    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_comp_threshold_minus_20 = 20 }
    set_variable = { tbm_comp_threshold_20 = tbm_tier_avg }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_comp_threshold_20 = 20 }
    set_variable = { tbm_comp_threshold_40 = tbm_tier_avg }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_comp_threshold_40 = 40 }

    # Pre-aggregate combat-branch bonus (land, air)
    set_variable = { tbm_total_combat_context_bonus = tbm_context_combat_bonus }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_total_combat_context_bonus = tbm_context_defensive_bonus }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_total_combat_context_bonus = tbm_context_faction_bonus }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_total_combat_context_bonus = tbm_context_lend_lease_bonus }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_total_combat_context_bonus = tbm_context_puppet_bonus }

    # Pre-aggregate non-combat-branch bonus (naval, industry)
    set_variable = { tbm_total_sharing_context_bonus = tbm_context_faction_bonus }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_total_sharing_context_bonus = tbm_context_lend_lease_bonus }
    add_to_variable = { tbm_total_sharing_context_bonus = tbm_context_puppet_bonus }

    # ===================================================
    # LAND branch - combat category
    # ===================================================
    set_variable = { tbm_effective_land_lag = tbm_base_lag }

    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_minus_40 compare = less_than } }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_effective_land_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_minus_20 compare = less_than } }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_effective_land_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_40 compare = greater_than } }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_land_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_20 compare = greater_than } }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_land_lag = 0.5 }
    }

    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_land_lag = tbm_total_combat_context_bonus }
    clamp_variable = { var = tbm_effective_land_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_effective_land_lag value = tbm_minimum_effective_lag compare = less_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_effective_land_lag = tbm_minimum_effective_lag }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # AIR branch - combat category
    # ===================================================
    set_variable = { tbm_effective_air_lag = tbm_base_lag }

    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_minus_40 compare = less_than } }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_effective_air_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_minus_20 compare = less_than } }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_effective_air_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_40 compare = greater_than } }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_air_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_20 compare = greater_than } }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_air_lag = 0.5 }
    }

    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_air_lag = tbm_total_combat_context_bonus }
    clamp_variable = { var = tbm_effective_air_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_effective_air_lag value = tbm_minimum_effective_lag compare = less_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_effective_air_lag = tbm_minimum_effective_lag }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # NAVAL branch - tech-sharing category only
    # ===================================================
    set_variable = { tbm_effective_naval_lag = tbm_base_lag }

    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_minus_40 compare = less_than } }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_effective_naval_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_minus_20 compare = less_than } }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_effective_naval_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_40 compare = greater_than } }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_naval_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_20 compare = greater_than } }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_naval_lag = 0.5 }
    }

    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_naval_lag = tbm_total_sharing_context_bonus }
    clamp_variable = { var = tbm_effective_naval_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_effective_naval_lag value = tbm_minimum_effective_lag compare = less_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_effective_naval_lag = tbm_minimum_effective_lag }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # INDUSTRY branch - tech-sharing category only
    # ===================================================
    set_variable = { tbm_effective_industry_lag = tbm_base_lag }

    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_minus_40 compare = less_than } }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_effective_industry_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_minus_20 compare = less_than } }
        add_to_variable = { tbm_effective_industry_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_40 compare = greater_than } }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_industry_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = tbm_comp_threshold_20 compare = greater_than } }
        subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_industry_lag = 0.5 }
    }

    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_effective_industry_lag = tbm_total_sharing_context_bonus }
    clamp_variable = { var = tbm_effective_industry_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_effective_industry_lag value = tbm_minimum_effective_lag compare = less_than } }
        set_variable = { tbm_effective_industry_lag = tbm_minimum_effective_lag }
    }
}

#---------------------------------------------------------
# Effect 4: tbm_compute_target_years
#
# Converts each branch's effective lag into an integer
# year-gap using ceil(lag), then subtracts that from the
# current game year. This matches the grant logic, which
# compares target years against integer tech years.
#---------------------------------------------------------
tbm_convert_effective_lag_to_year_gap = {
    set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 0 }

    if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 39.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 40 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 38.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 39 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 37.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 38 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 36.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 37 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 35.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 36 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 34.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 35 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 33.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 34 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 32.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 33 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 31.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 32 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 30.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 31 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 29.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 30 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 28.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 29 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 27.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 28 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 26.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 27 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 25.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 26 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 24.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 25 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 23.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 24 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 22.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 23 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 21.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 22 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 20.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 21 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 19.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 20 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 18.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 19 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 17.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 18 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 16.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 17 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 15.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 16 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 14.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 15 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 13.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 14 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 12.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 13 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 11.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 12 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 10.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 11 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 9.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 10 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 8.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 9 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 7.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 8 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 6.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 7 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 5.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 6 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 4.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 5 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 3.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 4 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 2.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 3 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 1.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 2 } }
    else_if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_effective_lag_source value = 0.49 compare = greater_than } } set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 1 } }
}

tbm_apply_frontier_buffer_to_year_gap = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_HISTORICAL }
            }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_lag_year_gap value = 2 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 2 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = tbm_auto_research_intensity option = TBM_ARCADE } }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_temp_lag_year_gap value = 1 compare = less_than }
        }
        # Balanced keeps auto-grants one full year behind the frontier.
        set_variable = { tbm_temp_lag_year_gap = 1 }
    }
}

tbm_compute_target_years = {
    set_variable = { tbm_temp_effective_lag_source = tbm_effective_land_lag }
    tbm_convert_effective_lag_to_year_gap = yes
    tbm_apply_frontier_buffer_to_year_gap = yes
    set_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = global.tbm_current_year }
    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_target_year_land = tbm_temp_lag_year_gap }

    set_variable = { tbm_temp_effective_lag_source = tbm_effective_air_lag }
    tbm_convert_effective_lag_to_year_gap = yes
    tbm_apply_frontier_buffer_to_year_gap = yes
    set_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = global.tbm_current_year }
    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_target_year_air = tbm_temp_lag_year_gap }

    set_variable = { tbm_temp_effective_lag_source = tbm_effective_naval_lag }
    tbm_convert_effective_lag_to_year_gap = yes
    tbm_apply_frontier_buffer_to_year_gap = yes
    set_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = global.tbm_current_year }
    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_target_year_naval = tbm_temp_lag_year_gap }

    set_variable = { tbm_temp_effective_lag_source = tbm_effective_industry_lag }
    tbm_convert_effective_lag_to_year_gap = yes
    tbm_apply_frontier_buffer_to_year_gap = yes
    set_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = global.tbm_current_year }
    subtract_from_variable = { tbm_target_year_industry = tbm_temp_lag_year_gap }
}

tbm_compute_next_grant_window = {
    set_variable = { tbm_months_to_next_grant = global.tbm_bucket_count }

    # Precompute wrap threshold (bucket_count - 1).
    set_temp_variable = { tbm_max_bucket = global.tbm_bucket_count }
    subtract_from_temp_variable = { tbm_max_bucket = 1 }

    # global.tbm_month_counter always points at the bucket scheduled for
    # the NEXT month. global.tbm_processing_bucket is the bucket currently
    # being processed. Starting from tbm_month_counter makes the UI stable:
    # countries processed this month show the full spread length until the
    # next pass, while future buckets count down one month at a time.
    set_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = global.tbm_month_counter }

    # Check each of the next 6 months to find when this country's bucket comes up.
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_bucket value = var:tbm_next_bucket compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { tbm_months_to_next_grant = 1 }
    }
    else = {
        add_to_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = 1 }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_next_bucket value = var:tbm_max_bucket compare = greater_than } }
            subtract_from_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = global.tbm_bucket_count }
        }
        if = {
            limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_bucket value = var:tbm_next_bucket compare = equals } }
            set_variable = { tbm_months_to_next_grant = 2 }
        }
        else = {
            add_to_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = 1 }
            if = {
                limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_next_bucket value = var:tbm_max_bucket compare = greater_than } }
                subtract_from_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = global.tbm_bucket_count }
            }
            if = {
                limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_bucket value = var:tbm_next_bucket compare = equals } }
                set_variable = { tbm_months_to_next_grant = 3 }
            }
            else = {
                add_to_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = 1 }
                if = {
                    limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_next_bucket value = var:tbm_max_bucket compare = greater_than } }
                    subtract_from_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = global.tbm_bucket_count }
                }
                if = {
                    limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_bucket value = var:tbm_next_bucket compare = equals } }
                    set_variable = { tbm_months_to_next_grant = 4 }
                }
                else = {
                    add_to_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = 1 }
                    if = {
                        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_next_bucket value = var:tbm_max_bucket compare = greater_than } }
                        subtract_from_temp_variable = { tbm_next_bucket = global.tbm_bucket_count }
                    }
                    if = {
                        limit = { check_variable = { var = tbm_bucket value = var:tbm_next_bucket compare = equals } }
                        set_variable = { tbm_months_to_next_grant = 5 }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
